title: Medical Summarization Specialist
description: We are seeking dedicated Medical Summarization Specialists to analyze patient clinical histories and create precise, structured medical records summaries. This role is crucial for helping healthcare providers review and interpret patient charts efficiently.
requirements: Requires transcription and typing experience
Requires strong comprehension skills and medical terminology knowledge
Candidates with medical scribe experience are also welcome
Requires a bachelor's degree in science (e.g. B.Sc., Biotech, Nursing) or a relevant field
Candidates must have strong written English skills (more so than conversational skills)
Strong analytical, reading comprehension, and summary synthesis skills
responsibilities: Review and analyze patient charts, medical records, and physician notes
Create accurate, concise, and structured summaries of patient clinical histories
Identify and extract key medical events, diagnoses, treatments, and procedures
Ensure consistency, accuracy, and completeness of summarized documents
Maintain strict compliance with HIPAA guidelines and patient privacy protocols
Collaborate with quality assurance teams to verify summary details
benefits: Competitive salary and performance incentives
Health insurance and wellness benefits
Flexible shift arrangements and specialized training programs
Excellent work environment in a modern Coimbatore facility

title: Medical Transcriptionist - Junior
description: We are looking for skilled Medical Transcriptionists to convert audio dictations from healthcare professionals into accurate written medical reports, clinical summaries, and patient letters.
requirements: Requires transcription and typing experience
Requires strong comprehension skills and medical terminology knowledge
Candidates with medical scribe experience are also welcome
Requires a bachelor's degree in science (e.g. B.Sc., Biotech, Nursing) or a relevant field
Candidates must have strong written English skills (more so than conversational skills)
Strong listening skills and familiarity with various medical accents
Minimum typing speed of 60 WPM with high accuracy
responsibilities: Listen to recorded dictations from healthcare providers
Transcribe medical audio files into high-quality written reports and documentation
Verify medical terminology, drug names, and anatomical terms for precision
Identify and flag formatting errors, inconsistencies, or unclear dictation
Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations and data confidentiality standards
Work closely with editors and quality analysts to maintain quality standards
benefits: Performance-based incentives and rewards
Health and wellness insurance coverage
Career progression and senior roles path
Training programs and skills development workshops

title: Medical Transcriptionist - Senior
description: We are looking for experienced Senior Medical Transcriptionists to lead transcription workflows, mentor junior transcriptionists, and ensure the highest quality in converting audio dictations into accurate medical documentation.
requirements: Requires extensive transcription and typing experience
Requires strong comprehension skills and advanced medical terminology knowledge
Candidates with medical scribe or QA editing experience are highly valued
Requires a bachelor's degree in science (e.g. B.Sc., Biotech, Nursing) or a relevant field
Candidates must have strong written English skills (more so than conversational skills)
Strong listening skills and familiarity with various medical accents and specialties
Minimum typing speed of 70 WPM with exceptional accuracy
responsibilities: Listen to recorded dictations from healthcare providers across multiple specialties
Transcribe and review medical audio files into high-quality written reports and documentation
Mentor and train junior transcriptionists on quality standards and best practices
Perform quality audits on transcribed documents and provide constructive feedback
Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations and data confidentiality standards
Coordinate with editors, quality analysts, and operations leads to maintain turnaround times
benefits: Performance-based incentives and rewards
Health and wellness insurance coverage
Leadership career progression path
Training programs and skills development workshops

title: Data Logistics Coordinator
description: We are hiring a Data Logistics Coordinator to manage the secure receipt, validation, categorization, and routing of medical documentation and client records. This is a foundational role ensuring data pipeline efficiency.
requirements: 3-5 years of experience in data management, medical records, or a related field
Proficiency in computer skills, spreadsheet management, and familiarity with data entry tools
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Ability to work in shifts and collaborate within a team
Basic understanding of data security principles and HIPAA compliance
responsibilities: Receive, log, and organize incoming clinical files and documents
Verify file integrity and validate documents against metadata
Categorize and index incoming records within the EHR systems
Monitor data pipeline queues to ensure timely processing and routing
Troubleshoot missing data or file errors in coordination with client managers
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and access controls
benefits: Comprehensive hands-on training
Mentorship and clear career growth path
Medical insurance coverage
Vibrant and supportive team environment

title: System Administrator
description: We are seeking a System / IT Administrator to maintain our secure computing environment, monitor network infrastructure, and manage server availability. You will ensure maximum system uptime and enforce HIPAA security compliance across all endpoints.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, Network Engineering, or a related field
3-5 years of hands-on experience with system administration (Windows/Linux servers)
Familiarity with network configuration, firewalls, routing, and switches
Knowledge of virtual machine environments (VMware/Hyper-V) and cloud platforms (AWS)
Certifications such as MCSA, CCNA, or Security+ are highly desirable
Understanding of enterprise security protocols and compliance audits
responsibilities: Install, configure, and maintain servers, network hardware, and client systems
Monitor system performance, perform backups, and execute disaster recovery plans
Enforce user access management, group policies, and biometric security controls
Implement endpoint security, anti-virus updates, firewall rules, and patch management
Troubleshoot hardware, software, and connectivity issues for local and remote users
Audit systems regularly to ensure alignment with HIPAA security regulations
benefits: Competitive remuneration packages
Health insurance and wellness incentives
Continuous technical certifications support
High exposure to modern secure network infrastructure

title: Virtual Medical Scribe
description: Join our team as a Virtual Medical Scribe. In this role, you will assist US-based physicians in real-time or near real-time, document patient encounters, enter patient history, and update Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems.
requirements: Excellent listening skills and fluent verbal and written English (to understand physician-patient interactions)
Strong knowledge of medical terminology, anatomy, physiology, and pharmacology
Proficiency in navigation of Electronic Health Record (EHR) software
Minimum typing speed of 50 WPM with excellent spelling and grammar
Strong multitasking skills and cognitive ability to summarize clinical discussions
Bachelor's degree in a life sciences field or equivalent healthcare experience
responsibilities: Listen to real-time clinical encounters or audio recordings
Accurately document clinical evaluations, diagnoses, prescriptions, and follow-up plans
Navigate and update electronic charts during patient visits
Ensure compliance with HIPAA security standards for patient health information
Verify documentation with the physician before final signing
Participate in continuous specialty training to stay updated on clinical standards
benefits: Premium salary package with specialty pay incentives
Dedicated medical scribe academy certification training
Comprehensive medical coverage
Opportunities to work directly with international medical consultants

title: AI / ML Engineer - Junior
description: We are looking for a Junior AI/ML Engineer to contribute to the design, training, and deployment of machine learning systems and Large Language Model (LLM) workflows. You will work alongside senior engineers building intelligent NLP pipelines and semantic analysis tools for healthcare data.
requirements: 3-5 years of experience in the AI/ML field and related technologies
Strong knowledge of Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and deep learning frameworks
Hands-on experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP), Large Language Models (LLMs), and prompt design
Knowledge of machine learning deployment strategies, cloud hosting platforms (AWS/Azure), and containers (Docker)
Strong mathematical foundation in statistics, probability, linear algebra, and machine learning theory
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a highly quantitative field
responsibilities: Assist in designing, training, testing, and optimizing machine learning models
Build and integrate LLM applications and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks under guidance
Collaborate with database and software engineers to deploy algorithms in cloud and EHR environments
Ensure strict data security and compliance (HIPAA) throughout the model training pipeline
Analyze model output quality and implement feedback loops to refine model accuracy
Stay up-to-date with emerging research and transfer academic advancements to production systems
benefits: Competitive salary package with technology bonuses
Flexible hybrid working options in Coimbatore
Subsidized continuous learning and online training certification courses
Comprehensive medical and health insurance coverage

title: AI / ML Engineer - Senior
description: We are looking for an experienced Senior AI/ML Engineer to lead the design, training, and deployment of advanced machine learning systems and Large Language Model (LLM) workflows. You will spearhead building intelligent natural language processing pipelines and semantic analysis tools for healthcare data.
requirements: 5-10+ years of vast experience in the AI/ML field and related technologies
Vast knowledge stack including Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and deep learning frameworks
Hands-on experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP), Large Language Models (LLMs), and prompt design
Knowledge of machine learning deployment strategies, cloud hosting platforms (AWS/Azure), and containers (Docker)
Strong mathematical foundation in statistics, probability, linear algebra, and machine learning theory
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a highly quantitative field
responsibilities: Lead the design, training, testing, and optimization of state-of-the-art machine learning models
Architect and integrate production-grade LLM applications and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks
Collaborate with database and software engineers to deploy algorithms in cloud and EHR environments
Ensure strict data security and compliance (HIPAA) throughout the model training pipeline
Analyze model output quality and implement feedback loops to continuously refine model accuracy
Stay up-to-date with emerging research and transfer academic advancements to production systems
benefits: Premium salary package with targeted technology bonuses
Flexible hybrid working options in Coimbatore
Subsidized continuous learning and online training certification courses
Comprehensive medical and health insurance coverage

title: Software Developer - Junior
description: We are looking for a Junior Software Developer to join our engineering team and contribute to building scalable web applications, healthcare integrations, and cloud-based platforms. You will work on full-stack development projects supporting our healthcare KPO and technology service offerings.
requirements: 3-5 years of experience in software development using modern frameworks and languages
Proficiency in one or more of: JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, or Java
Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB)
Familiarity with RESTful API design, version control (Git), and CI/CD pipelines
Understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker)
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
responsibilities: Develop, test, and maintain web applications and internal tools across the technology stack
Build and integrate RESTful APIs and microservices for healthcare data workflows
Write clean, well-documented, and testable code following coding standards and best practices
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including QA, DevOps, and product management
Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and agile development ceremonies
Troubleshoot and resolve software defects, performance issues, and deployment challenges
benefits: Competitive salary and performance bonuses
Flexible working arrangements and hybrid options
Access to the latest tools, technologies, and learning platforms
Comprehensive medical and health insurance coverage

title: Software Developer - Senior
description: We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Developer to lead the architecture and development of scalable web applications, healthcare integrations, and cloud-native platforms. You will mentor junior developers and drive engineering excellence across our technology service offerings.
requirements: 5-10+ years of hands-on experience in full-stack software development
Expert-level proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, or Java
Deep experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB)
Strong expertise in system design, scalable architecture, and microservices patterns
Proficiency in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and CI/CD
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
responsibilities: Architect, develop, and maintain complex web applications and distributed systems
Lead technical design reviews, code architecture decisions, and engineering best practices
Mentor junior and mid-level developers through code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing
Build and integrate production-grade APIs, microservices, and healthcare data pipelines
Drive DevOps and deployment automation strategies for continuous delivery
Collaborate with product, QA, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions
benefits: Premium salary package with leadership bonuses
Flexible working arrangements and hybrid options
Access to the latest tools, technologies, and learning platforms
Comprehensive medical and health insurance coverage
